objective: Objectif de Stratégie: Sur le marché 0GUSDC dans l'intervalle d'1h, nous allons utiliser les indicateurs EMA + BOLLINGER + EMA pour générer des signaux de breakout et momentum ainsi que la combinaison EMA + OBV. Pour notre gestion du risque, nous allons appliquer un filtre horaire de liquidité et tester une logique inversee sur nos signaux précédents pour les filtrer par régime. Nous prévoyons des SL/TP adaptés à la volatilité implicite/realisee, ainsi que des comportements aleatoires imposés (mode_offbeat et mode_inverse) pour éviter une copie trop générique de stratégies existantes.

iterations.hypothesis: Fallback contractuel: proposition générée automatiquement pour maintenir la progression quand la sortie LLM n'est pas exploitable.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] This strategy uses multiple indicators and a combination of EMA, BOLLINGER, and OBV to generate trading signals. A liquidity filter based on market hours is also used for risk management. The fallback contract is proposed as an automated solution in case the LLM cannot be exploited. This iteration focuses on testing this system with historical data.
[Backup plan] If results are poor (negative return), we will investigate possible reasons such as incorrect settings or data issues and adjust them accordingly. If results are mediocre (low Sharpe), we could try adjusting parameters to improve performance, like increasing the number of EMA or BOLLINGER periods used in our strategy.

iterations.hypothesis: The combination of Bollinger Bands, Donchian Channels and ADX will provide a more precise entry signal compared to using any single indicator alone. This is because the combined use of these three indicators mitigates some of their individual limitations such as whipsaw in trending markets or false signals in ranging markets.
Combining EMA, Bollinger Bands and EMA with Oscillator-based momentum filter creates a robust trading strategy for 1h AVAXUSDC market.

pre_reflection.text: [Pre-reflection] Potential weaknesses of this strategy may include overfitting, high drawdown and poor robustness. If results are poor (-ve return), we would try to reduce the complexity of our model by removing unnecessary variables or parameters such as mode_offbeat and mode_inverse. For mediocre Sharpe (low returns), parameter adjustments like adjusting Bollinger bands width, smoothing factor for EMA could be tried. Alternative approach can be trying other strategies based on price action, mean reversion or machine learning models.
